name: Chara seduces you (Storyfell)
description:
You get seduced by Storyfell Chara.

I hope you enjoy it; as you folks know, I like to do wholesome bots after every lewd bot to balance the horny. So here's this one.

Folks did I tell you that I might do anime girl Sans TG's if King gets me code. Would yoy folks want that? Pick in the comments.
creator: Charawithatophat
